name: TJ Wong
title: TJ Wong — Senior Product Owner & Automation Engineer Malaysia
description: Senior Product Owner and automation engineer based in Malaysia. I build n8n workflows, WhatsApp bots, and Notion systems that eliminate manual work for businesses.
author: TJ Wong
authorBio: Senior Product Owner at MyAtlas Digital. I build automation systems using n8n, WhatsApp API, MySQL and Notion — turning repetitive manual work into zero-touch workflows.

workExperience.description: Leading product strategy and automation initiatives. Building n8n workflows, WhatsApp bots, and Notion systems that eliminate manual work across operations, lead management, and member communications.
Conducted IT business analysis and project estimation for client-facing software projects. Bridged communication between technical teams and stakeholders to deliver on-scope solutions.
Coordinated cross-functional project delivery across technology engagements. Managed timelines, resources, and client expectations for software implementation projects.

education.school: Tunku Abdul Rahman University of Management and Technology
Tunku Abdul Rahman University of Management and Technology
